nasb.text: I will bring them back from the land of Egypt And gather them from Assyria; And I will bring them into the land of Gilead and Lebanon Until no room can be found for them.

esv.text: I will bring them home from the land of Egypt, and gather them from Assyria, and I will bring them to the land of Gilead and to Lebanon, till there is no room for them.

cnv.text: 我要使他們從埃及地歸回， 從亞述地招聚他們， 帶他們到基列地和黎巴嫩山， 卻仍不夠容納他們。

ccb.text: 我必从埃及领他们回到故土， 从亚述招聚他们， 领他们到基列和黎巴嫩， 那里将不够他们居住。
